Hi! I am Hoang Bao Loc

Web development.

Contact meMy resume

Introduction

About me

A motivated Software Engineering graduate with over 6 months of hands-on experience in fullstack web development. Experienced in building web applications using Java Spring Boot and ReactJS, with a solid foundation in MySQL and PostgreSQL. Eager to apply my technical and problem-solving skills to develop effective web solutions and grow within a professional team.

  • Languages

    Java, JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, PHP

  • Education

    Sai Gon University

  • Projects

    Built more than 4 projects

Tools I Work With

Professional development tools that power my workflow.

VS Code

Lightweight, powerful editor for modern web development with rich extension support.

IntelliJ

Smart Java IDE with advanced refactoring, debugging, and Spring Boot integration.

Postman

Test and document REST APIs quickly with an intuitive request-building interface.

Git

Track changes, collaborate, and manage code history across every project.

Technical Expertise

Key skills that define my professional identity.

Java Spring Boot

Experienced in building robust and scalable backend applications using Java Spring Boot, with a strong focus on RESTful API development, security, and database integration.

MySQL

Proficient in designing, implementing, and optimizing relational databases using MySQL.

Docker

Skilled in containerizing applications and managing containerized environments using Docker.

PostgreSQL

Proficient in designing, implementing, and optimizing relational databases using PostgreSQL.

Tailwind CSS

Skilled in creating responsive and customizable user interfaces using Tailwind CSS.

React

Skilled in building dynamic and responsive user interfaces using React and its ecosystem.

Next.js

Experienced in creating server-side rendered and statically generated React applications with Next.js.

Strapi

Familiar with building headless content management systems using Strapi.

GitHub

Experienced in version control and collaborative development using GitHub.

Experience

Professional journey and career timeline.

Frontend Developer

11/2025 - 03/2026
CCVI

Phu Nhuan District, HCM City

Designed responsive interfaces with NextJS for Eduhub.vn and built admin dashboard with Strapi CMS. Developed purchasing and inventory systems aligned with complex database structures.

Web Developer

08/2025 - 11/2025
Amethyst

Binh Thanh District, HCM City

Developed frontend features for UMIYA website using ReactJS and NextJS. Designed and integrated RESTful APIs with Java Spring Boot backend for seamless data communication.

Freelance Web Developer

02/2025 - 04/2025

Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam

A web-based platform for managing online courses, featuring user authentication, role-based access (Admin/Student), course enrollment, and profile management.

What I offer

My Services

I am a web developer with experience in backend development. I can help you build a website that meets your needs.

Frontend

Experienced in building responsive and interactive web interfaces using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Bootstrap, React, Tailwind, and Next.js.

Backend

Skilled in developing scalable and secure backend systems with Java, Spring Boot, NodeJS, and PHP.
